gbp_search: Atlanta Expert Appliance Repair Decatur GA

business_context.specialties: Sub-Zero, Viking, Thermador, Wolf, KitchenAid, GE Monogram, JennAir, Miele, all major brands
business_context.recent_gbp_activity: Owner posted photos approximately 9 days ago as of research date

hero.search_for: Technician repairing high-end kitchen appliance (refrigerator, oven, dishwasher) in a residential home. Steve Baker in uniform if available, or a generic appliance repair tech with professional demeanor. Prefer photos showing Steve's branded van or uniform.
hero.aspect_hint: wide landscape 1024x700 or similar; will be used as full-viewport background with dark gradient overlay

gallery.search_for: Completed appliance repair work: refrigerators serviced, ovens repaired, washer/dryer installations, ice machines, dishwashers. Prefer owner-uploaded photos over customer-uploaded review photos. Show variety of appliance types.
gallery.aspect_hint: 4:3 or 3:2 landscape preferred; used in work-gallery grid

specs.quality_hint: JPEG quality 75-85 is the sweet spot

fallback_if_unavailable.hero: Use contextual Unsplash: 'appliance repair technician home' or 'kitchen appliance repair'. Note in delivery message that GBP hero unavailable.
fallback_if_unavailable.gallery: If fewer than 6 usable gallery photos exist on GBP, deliver what's available (min 3) and note count in delivery message. Do NOT pad with stock photos.

acceptance_criteria: Hero photo is authentic to the business (real van, uniform, tech, or contextually close Unsplash)
Gallery photos show actual appliance repair work, not stock kitchen scenes
No photos of Steve himself without permission signal (owner-uploaded is fine, third-party tech photos are not)
pilot_notes: First photo brief through the git-branch-as-transport contract. Feedback on brief format is welcome alongside delivery.
